name: Tide Pool
description: Miniature tide pool ripples with tranquil ebb

prompts.SessionStart: tidal resonance ascending with bright pool echo bloom, tidal bell tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: tidal resonance descending with smooth pool echo decay, tidal bell tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single bright tidal bell with satisfying pool echo ring, tidal resonance, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct tidal tick with crisp pool echo click, tidal tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short tidal chirp confirming with bright pool echo ping, tidal tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two tidal tones with questioning rising pool echo interval, tidal bell, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady tidal pulse with clear rhythmic pool echo pattern, tidal tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: tidal tone splitting into two diverging pool echo voices, tidal sound, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear tidal ping returning with distinct pool echo ring, tidal tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright tidal burst with energetic pool echo resonant attack, tidal bell tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
